LAW AND MOTION 302,PLAINTIFF ELAINE LISSNER MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT ENTERED INTO WITH DEFENDANTS CORBIN MOTORS, INC. AND CORBIN MOTORS.COM, INC. PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 664.6: NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING (GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED). (302/AJR/JU) COURT REPORTER PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR #1193

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LISSNER, ELAINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORBIN MOTORS INC CORBIN MOTORS.COM $25,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $3,623.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $28,623.00, - JUDGMENT AND ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT ENTERED INTO WITH DEFENDANTS CORBIN MOTORS INC. AND CORBIN MOTORS.COM, INC. PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6. PLAINTIFF ALSO TO RECOVER AGAINST DEFENDANTS PREJUDGMENT INTEREST AT THE RATE OF 10% ON THE $25,000.00 FROM AUG. 9, 2002. PLAINTIFF IS ALSO ENTITLED TO INTEREST AT AN ANNUAL RATE OF 10% FROM THE DATE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT UNTIL PAID IN FULL. SEE SCANNED DOC
